rationale.ai-review: audits LLM-as-a-Judge for code and documents its reliability limits
rationale.agentic: judges complete AI-generated candidates in agentic patch-selection/merge pipelines
rationale.method-experiment: controlled bias interventions characterizing third-party judge models (Qwen/GPT)
rationale.demote:context: tool validation of a judge's own reliability, no oversight mechanism contributed
